svg.title: Research paper to explanatory video pipeline
svg.desc: A flowchart showing 5 stages: PDF upload, paper understanding, concept extraction, storyboarding (with human review), Manim code generation, rendering, and final video output.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the PDF parsing step in the pipeline')
sendPrompt('How does the paper understanding module work?')
sendPrompt('How does concept extraction and narrative generation work?')
sendPrompt('What happens during the storyboarding stage?')
sendPrompt('How does the Manim code generation work?')
sendPrompt('How does the rendering and video assembly step work?')
sendPrompt('What does the final video output look like?')
